rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s
rect.data-narration: Part-of-Speech Tagging is the process of assigning a grammatical category to each word in a text. It is a fundamental task in Natural Language Processing (NLP) that sits at the intersection of morphological analysis and syntactic analysis.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s; opacity: 0.5;
rect.data-narration: POS tags provide a shallow level of syntactic understanding that is crucial for many downstream NLP applications. They help in disambiguation, parsing, information extraction, text-to-speech, and machine translation.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
rect.data-narration: Words are categorized into classes based on their grammatical function, meaning, and form. The major word classes are nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, and pronouns.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;

svg.text: Noun (N) - Names a person, place, thing, or idea
Verb (V) - Expresses an action, occurrence, or state of being
Adjective (J) - Modifies a noun, describing qualities
Adverb (R) - Modifies a verb, adjective, or other adverb
Pronoun (P) - Takes the place of a noun

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
rect.data-narration: Nouns are words that refer to people, places, things, or ideas. They can be common or proper, concrete or abstract.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
rect.data-narration: Verbs are words that express actions, occurrences, or states of being. They can be transitive or intransitive.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
rect.data-narration: Adjectives are words that modify nouns, describing qualities such as size, shape, color, or temperature.

rect.style: fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
fill: #F7F7F7; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 10px; transition: opacity 0.3s;
